title: Planar coil stellarator
assignee: Princeton University (PPPL invention; exclusively licensed to Thea Energy)
status_note: Active (as displayed on GP; indicative)
claim_theme: planar shaping-coil array stellarator; controllers, supplies, switching to coil subsets
indep_claim_gist: Stellarator with field-shaping units carrying planar shaping coils on structural mounts plus planar encircling coils; dependent claims 28-32 recite controllers, power supplies adjusting current in coil subsets, switching systems connecting supplies to subsets.
notes: Expiry est. 2042+. System-level fence over shaping-by-software arrays (Thea license); converter internals NOT claimed. U-017 anchor; design-around = converter/protection electronics claims, not stellarator geometry.

title: Planar coil stellarator including removable field shaping units
status_note: Granted 2025-10-21; fetched at FPO full text (GP HTTP 503 this run; playbook ladder fallback)
family: PCT/US24/25937 (pub. WO2024226565A3 per GP search listing)
claim_theme: removable field-shaping units in structural scaffold; array maintenance mechanics
indep_claim_gist: Stellarator comprising structural scaffold with removable field-shaping units containing planar shaping coils, encircling coils in geometric ratios, neutronic blanket units; controllers recited generically - no power-supply or per-coil-drive electronics claimed.
notes: Expiry est. 2044+. Thea's own filing fences FSU mechanics, not drive electronics - key WS-1 evidence (U-017). Continuations could grow claims; re-check family quarterly.

title: Device for feeding a charge including integrated energy storage
assignee: EPFL + European Organization for Nuclear Research (CERN)
status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (2018) - verify before reliance
claim_theme: series DC/DC converters with integrated storage capacitors for pulsed magnet loads
indep_claim_gist: Supply for loads with high short-duration power peaks using series-connected DC/DC converters, each with integrated storage capacitor and control balancing capacitor voltages (CERN PS POPS lineage).
notes: Foundational storage-integrated topology art for U-020/U-021; displayed-expired status is a counsel question, not concluded here.

title: Supplying multiple inductive loads
status_note: FR member displays Expired - Fee Related on GP; US member US9743506B2 verified at FPO (issued 2017-08-22)
claim_theme: per-magnet dedicated converters plus standby converter, auto-switch on fault
indep_claim_gist: System powering multiple electromagnets where each has a dedicated converter plus a standby unit; anomaly detection automatically switches failing loads to the standby converter without stopping operation (US member claim).
notes: Expiry est. 2035. Nearest N+1-for-magnet-arrays claim found (U-014/U-018). FR lapsed per display; verify US/EP member status before reliance. Cited-by chase: CN electromagnet-drive + Infineon freewheel art (off-scope).

title: Power supply system with plural parallel modules and loop current limiting
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2037-08-22 (GP display); TW priority 105131323 per FPO
family: TW priority 105131323 (no CN member shown on fetched pages)
claim_theme: loop-current limiting between paralleled converter modules via coupled DM inductor
indep_claim_gist: Power converting device with two parallel-coupled modules and a loop-current limiting circuit using a coupled differential-mode inductor with separate inductive units per branch for automatic balancing.
notes: Representative live datacenter-class paralleling art (charter prior-art-risk mandate): narrow circuit claim, not magnet-specific. Design-around: active digital share loop, no coupled-DM-inductor limiter.

title: System and method for power sharing in a multiple UPS system
status_note: Granted 2019; fetched at FPO (GP 503 this run)
claim_theme: paired-inductor common-bus power sharing across multiple UPS
indep_claim_gist: Multiple supplies power loads via common bus with paired inductors sized to isolate during bus faults yet allow surviving units to power a failed unit's load.
notes: Vertiv/Liebert datacenter redundancy art (charter mandate): AC UPS bus sharing, not precision DC magnet strings.

title: Dual input, hot swappable dual redundant, enhanced N+1 AC to DC power system
status_note: Expired-class (20y from 2000 priority) - indicative
claim_theme: hot-swappable N+1 bulk AC-DC modules, dual-grid split supplies
indep_claim_gist: Bulk supply with two converter subsystems fed from separate AC grids, each providing about half output, either supplying full power on failure of the other.
notes: Foundational N+1 hot-swap art: generic redundancy claims predate any magnet-specific filing by decades - bounds what a P08 entrant can claim generically.

title: Load share controller for balancing current between multiple supply modules
status_note: Expired-class (20y from 2000) - indicative
claim_theme: master-election load-share controller with hot-swap
indep_claim_gist: Load-share controller identifying lowest-current converter and designating it master to balance current among parallel modules; hot-swap capable.
notes: Generic current-share IC art; brackets expired foundations of module paralleling with US4924170A.

title: Current sharing modular power supply
status_note: Expired (age) - indicative
claim_theme: droop-style PWM current equalization across modules
indep_claim_gist: Regulator equalizing load currents of paralleled modules: current sensing plus PWM adjusts each module's output inversely with load voltage, modules acting substantially independently.
notes: 1989 droop-sharing foundation; generic-paralleling theme saturates here (no new claim themes in later generic art).

title: Shunt connected superconducting energy management system having a single switchable connection to the grid
status_note: Expired-class (20y from 1998) - indicative
claim_theme: modular parallel AC/DC converters + linkable SC magnets, scalable storage
indep_claim_gist: Energy storage/backup system (2-200 MW) with modular prefabricated AC/DC converters connectable in parallel for current sharing and modular linkable superconducting magnets, single switched grid connection.
notes: 1998 art already combining modular converter paralleling + SC magnet modularity - prior-art anchor bounding U-020/U-021 filings.

title: Cryogenic magnet power supply
status_note: Granted 2021; fetched at FPO (GP 503 this run); GB-priority family - verify siblings at GP
claim_theme: in-cryostat SMPS per-magnet supply; ramp vs steady-state modes
indep_claim_gist: Magnet assembly with superconducting coil, cryogenic system, external DC source, internal step-down SMPS inside the cryostat, controller switching between ramp-up and steady-state power levels.
notes: Expiry est. 2038. Fences in-cryostat per-coil supply placement (adjacent U-017); design-around = warm-side multichannel drive. Fits TE '200+ patents' bundling posture (CS-H).

title: Fusion reactor superconducting magnet system
assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, CAS (HFIPS - ASIPP parent)
status_note: Granted 2026-02-17 per FPO full text (GP 503 this run)
claim_theme: integrated magnet + power supply + multi-modal quench diagnostic system
indep_claim_gist: Fusion superconducting magnet system comprising magnet unit, integrated power supply system with AC/DC distribution and monitoring module, connected to quench diagnostics combining resistive voltage, distributed fiber, and voiceprint modules.
notes: Expiry est. 2043. CN institute fencing the integrated supply+protection seam IN THE US (U-025/U-023). CN-family. Claim-chart depth needed before any integrated-product filing - counsel question.

title: Synchrotron magnet power supply control system and control method, and synchrotron
status_note: WO publication fetched at FPO; national-phase members' status not checked - indicative
family: JP national phase presumed - verify at GP
claim_theme: shared main pattern + per-magnet corrective patterns distributed to many supplies
indep_claim_gist: Computer manages shared acceleration/deceleration pattern plus individual correction pattern per bending magnet; control devices combine patterns and drive each magnet power supply synchronously.
notes: Family expiry est. 2031 (indicative). Closest found orchestration-of-many-magnet-supplies claim (U-031/U-018); medical-synchrotron framing.

title: Full energy-storage pulse power supply and current pulse production method
title_zh: 全储能脉冲电源及电流脉冲产生方法
assignee: 中国科学院近代物理研究所 (Institute of Modern Physics, CAS - IMP)
status_note: Application REJECTED per GP legal status 2025-02-21 - indicative
claim_theme: modular H-bridge units, storage caps supply ramp energy, fall energy recycled
notes: HIAF fast-ramp lineage (U-020): invention claims rejected; abstract-depth read. Published concept = prior art against newcomers claiming capacitor-recycled ramp energy with modular series/parallel units.

title: Full energy-storage pulse power supply and particle accelerator
title_zh: 全储能脉冲电源及粒子加速器
assignee: 中国科学院近代物理研究所 (Institute of Modern Physics, CAS - IMP)
status_note: Active per GP display; CN utility model 10y term ends 2028-02-05 - indicative
claim_theme: utility model: storage-capacitor modular units series/parallel to magnet electrodes
indep_claim_gist: Multiple power units, each with voltage source and energy-storage capacitor, connected in series-parallel to magnet electrodes; capacitors supply all rise-phase pulse energy and recover fall-phase energy for reuse.
notes: CN-only device-claim fence on storage-ramp modular architecture to 2028-02 (U-020/U-021) - lapses before a 2029/2030 launch; displays active, verify before reliance.

title: Power converter having power stage circuits and an auxiliary module
status_note: Granted 2023; fetched at FPO (GP 503 this run)
claim_theme: paralleled power stages with auxiliary module preventing reverse inductor current
indep_claim_gist: Power converter with multiple power stage circuits and an auxiliary module between capacitor and inductor preventing reverse current so magnetic-element current stays non-negative in discontinuous conduction.
notes: Modern CN-origin generic multi-stage art: shows CN commercial filers fence stage-level circuits, not magnet-load paralleling. CN-family.

title: Charging and field supplement circuit for superconducting magnets based on pulsed current
status_note: Granted 2024-01-09; fetched at FPO (GP 503 this run)
claim_theme: capacitive pulsed-current charging reaching kA magnetization from small source
indep_claim_gist: Charging circuit for superconducting magnets: capacitor charge/discharge circuits, energy-storage capacitor, SMES loop and persistent-current switch with defined temperature boundaries; kA-class discharge from watt-class source.
notes: Expiry est. 2041. Alternative kA-scaling route (flux-pump-adjacent) relevant to U-014 scaling economics; not a converter-paralleling claim. CN-family.

title: Selectable coil array
status_note: Granted 2016; fetched at FPO (GP 503 this run); CN sibling CN102804541B fetched at GP 2026-07-04 top-up
claim_theme: coil array with driver circuits and controller energizing selected coil subsets
indep_claim_gist: Coil-array system with selectable coil subsets connected to driver circuits, position detection, controller energizing multiple coils simultaneously, series resonant capacitors maintaining resonance regardless of coil count.
notes: Wireless-power domain: the densest existing 'per-coil selection/energization' claim family - nearest art bounding WS-1; not confinement magnets. CN sibling CN102804541B verified at its GP page 2026-07-04 (caveat removed): granted, displays Active to 2030-04-08, CN member shows 2009-04-08 priority, current assignee displayed as Philips IP entity - CN-family row confirmed.

title: Multi-scenario online reconfiguration system for test power supplies and control method thereof
title_zh: 一种测试电源多场景在线重构系统及其控制方法
assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co Ltd (西安爱科赛博电气股份有限公司); GP current-assignee line displayed a transfer-style entity (Xi'an CIMC Tianda Aike Power Technology) - verify at merge
status_note: Granted 2025-09-05, Active per GP; anticipated expiration 2042-08-05 - indicative
claim_theme: online series/parallel reconfiguration of multiple test supplies routed to test stations
indep_claim_gist: System: reconfiguration control system monitoring multiple test power supplies plus a reconfiguration device whose internal series/parallel switching reorganizes supply outputs and connects them to target test stations per station requirements; supplies and stations execute reconfiguration directives and test cases.
notes: Expiry est. 2042-08. THE flagged Actionpower 'online reconfiguration' family (P08 tool-note lead, now fetched). Fences switch-matrix reaggregation of test supplies in CN test-power framing; not superconducting-magnet-specific and silent on ppm current share, DCCT reference, magnet-safe extraction - WS-2 survives. U-014/U-018 context.

title: Multi-device coordination management system and method
title_zh: 多设备协调管理系统及方法
assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co Ltd (西安爱科赛博电气股份有限公司)
status_note: Application pending as displayed on GP - claims can change
claim_theme: MVVM software architecture coordinating heterogeneous test devices; grouping, command routing, status push
indep_claim_gist: Multi-device coordination management system using MVVM dynamic architecture: device-access management, automatic grouping with per-device ViewModel managers, WPF-template visual rendering, instruction parsing and real-time status monitoring forming an access-group-execute-monitor closed loop.
notes: The flagged 'multi-device coordinated management' 2026 publication (P08 tool-note lead, now fetched). Software/UI-architecture claims for test benches - NOT deterministic-sync converter fleet control; nearest CN art bounding WS-3 (U-031/U-018). Pending - watch.

title: Cooperative control system for fast-scanning magnet power supply
title_zh: 快速扫描磁体电源协同控制系统 (as rendered on GP)
assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co Ltd (西安爱科赛博电气股份有限公司)
status_note: Application pending as displayed on GP - claims can change
cpc: control-of-voltage/current class as displayed (G05F-class; verify at grant)
claim_theme: magnet supply with HV dynamic module + LV static module, hysteresis handover, integral hold
indep_claim_gist: Magnet-supply cooperative control system: error-acquisition module, high-voltage dynamic module for fast current transitions, low-voltage static module for steady-state precision, control module with dual-threshold hysteresis switchover and integral-hold/resume logic preventing overshoot at handover.
notes: NEW since outage pass: first magnet-supply-specific Actionpower filing seen (accelerator fast-scan framing). Intra-supply dynamic/static coordination, not array/fleet orchestration - WS-3 whitespace unchanged but nearest-art updated. Pending A-pub: claims can grow, re-check quarterly. U-018/U-020 adjacency.

title: Modularized pulse magnet liquid-cooled power supply device
title_zh: 模块化脉冲磁体液冷电源装置 (as rendered on GP)
assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co Ltd (西安爱科赛博电气股份有限公司)
status_note: Application pending as displayed on GP - claims can change
cpc: not captured at fetch depth (verify at GP)
claim_theme: integrated chassis packaging of modular pulse-magnet supply: 8 parallel IGBT units, boost, cap bank, cold plate
indep_claim_gist: Modular pulse-magnet liquid-cooled supply: U-shaped skeleton chassis integrating rectifier bridge, eight parallel IGBT modules plus boost-stage IGBT, modular electrolytic-capacitor units with equalizing resistors, laminated busbar, liquid-cooling plate with quick-disconnects, fiber-controlled chopper boards; vibration-reinforced packaging.
notes: NEW since outage pass: Actionpower packaging/integration claims for accelerator pulse-magnet supplies (magnetostriction-vibration framing). Mechanical/integration fence, not paralleling-control - WS-4 product-architecture whitespace narrows at the packaging layer only. Pending; watch with CN121785095A (same-day priority).

title: Capacitor energy storage unit and high-voltage pulse generator
title_zh: 一种电容储能单元及高压脉冲发生器
assignee: Xuji Group Co Ltd; XJ Electric Co Ltd; Xuji Power Co Ltd (许继电源); Beijing Huashang Sanyou New Energy Technology
status_note: Granted 2019-12-06; displays Expired - Fee Related on GP (nominal term to 2038-01-11) - verify before reliance
claim_theme: coaxial low-inductance capacitor-storage unit for HV pulse generators; fusion in background
indep_claim_gist: Capacitive energy-storage unit: capacitors in conductive shell, negative electrodes bonded to shell, positive electrodes interconnected by conductive pieces insulated from housing, positive leads through via holes forming coaxial low-inductance discharge loop; unit feeds a high-voltage pulse generator.
notes: Resolves the withheld XJ lead (P08 tool note): grant exists, mentions 受控热核聚变 research in background only, and DISPLAYS lapsed for fees - fence dead per display (verify). The rumored 300 MVA supercap-cascade TF-supply filing STILL not found under any XJ assignee variant (re-swept 2026-07-04) - bounded absence stands [CS-G-07]. U-020/U-021 context.
